title: jasminum flexile
intro: Jasminum flexile, also known as the flexible jasmine, is a species of flowering plant in the olive family (Oleaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Jasminum flexile include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and acting as an expectorant to relieve coughs and congestion. The herbal preparations of this plant include tea, essential oil, and tincture, which can be used to make perfumes, aromatherapy products, and natural remedies for various ailments.
